name: Kestra Workflow Orchestration MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for Kestra — the open-source event-driven workflow orchestration platform. Enables AI agents to trigger Kestra flow executions, query execution status, manage flows and namespaces, and monitor pipeline health. Kestra is used for data engineering, ETL, and complex workflow orchestration as a Prefect/Airflow alternative.
use_cases: Triggering Kestra flow executions from AI agent orchestration layers
Monitoring pipeline execution status and failures from data observability agents
Managing Kestra flows, namespaces, and triggers from DataOps automation agents
Querying execution logs and metrics from workflow analytics agents
not_for: Simple cron scheduling without workflow logic (use cron for that)
best_when: A data engineering team using Kestra wants AI agents to monitor and trigger data pipelines — enabling intelligent orchestration based on external triggers or conditions.
avoid_when: You're evaluating new orchestration tools — Kestra is open-source but has operational complexity. AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Autonomous pipeline execution affects data systems.

auth.notes: Kestra API key authentication. Enterprise edition supports more advanced auth including SSO. Self-hosted authentication varies by deployment.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Kestra Open Source is free; Enterprise adds advanced features
pricing.notes: Kestra is open source (Apache 2.0). Enterprise edition adds SSO, multi-tenancy, and support.

performance.rate_limits: Depends on Kestra deployment size and resources

known_agent_gotchas: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Pipeline execution affects production data systems
Official MCP server from Kestra team — well-maintained for a newer project
Flow execution may have long-running jobs — agents must handle async status polling
Kestra YAML flow syntax must be valid — agents generating flows need Kestra expertise
agent_readiness.security_notes: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Workflow orchestration executes code against data systems. Self-hosted data residency. API key auth. Production pipeline execution requires governance.

security_score_components.security_notes: Workflow orchestration platform. Self-hosted data control. Production pipeline triggering requires human oversight.
